name: Copper
description: A CRM built for Google Workspace users that manages contacts, pipelines, and sales workflows.

auth_methods.note: Developer docs explicitly list OAuth2.0 and API Keys (token-based) as the two supported authentication methods.

credential_access.note: OAuth QuickStart states you can "register your app in our Developer Dashboard" (login and click “Create”), after which Copper generates a client_id and client_secret—indicating self-serve credential issuance. However, this page does not explicitly confirm that API access is included on a free plan (it describes registration/credentials, not plan entitlements), so confidence remains medium.

api_surface.note: The developer site states the Copper Developer API provides a RESTful interface with JSON-formatted responses and 'access most Copper resources.'

buildability.note: Public developer docs (developer site, authentication, and OAuth quickstart) provide REST API reference and instructions to register apps and obtain credentials, enabling development today without manual approval. The only remaining uncertainty is whether specific plan limits apply (pricing page does not explicitly gate API access).

queries: Copper CRM API documentation developer site:copper.com Copper API docs "developer" "API"
